name: Signicat
description: Signicat is a European digital identity platform offering a single API to integrate 35+ national eID schemes, document verification, biometric checks and qualified electronic signatures across 44+ countries.

seo.title: Signicat — KYC / KYB / AML API
seo.meta_description: Signicat: Signicat is a European digital identity platform offering a single API to integrate 35+ national eID schemes, document verification, biometric checks

when_to_use: 35+ national eID scheme integration via single European API
Qualified electronic signature with eIDAS compliance
Video KYC and document check for EU financial services
BankID and NemID integration for Nordic digital services
Identity verification for DORA-compliant fintech onboarding

pros: 35+ national eID schemes behind one API
cons: Heavy EU focus, limited outside Europe
Product breadth can overwhelm small teams
Integration depth varies by eID scheme
review.verdict: Best single API for European eID integration; essential for EU-wide banks and eSign flows.
review.best_for: European banks and regulated firms needing multi-country eID plus qualified electronic signatures
review.not_for: US or APAC-only teams where Signicat's European eID coverage delivers little additional value

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales alone is not peak-lock evidence

lock_in.reason: Single API for many eIDs, switchable
